cards.back: A cloud client is an application that accesses cloud services from a remote server over the internet.
A cloud broker is an entity that provides a layer of abstraction between cloud clients and cloud service providers.

cards.front: What is a Cloud Service Provider (CSP)?
cards.back: A cloud service provider is a company that offers cloud computing services, such as infrastructure, platforms, and software.
A self-service model is a cloud delivery model in which users can provision and manage cloud resources using a web portal or other interface.

cards.front: What is a Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS)?
cards.back: Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) is a cloud computing model in which a provider offers virtualized computing resources, such as servers and storage, over the internet.
